final_message:
Done — the full suite passes (`6 passed`). There were two bugs in `lrucache/cache.py`, both in the LRU bookkeeping:

1. **`get` didn't refresh recency** — a cache hit returned the value but left the key in its old position in the `OrderedDict`, so recently-read entries were still evicted first. Fixed by calling `move_to_end(key)` on a non-expired hit (`lrucache/cache.py:30`).

2. **`put` evicted when updating an existing key** — the eviction check fired whenever the cache was at capacity, even when overwriting a key already present (which doesn't grow the cache). That wrongly evicted an unrelated entry. Fixed by only evicting when the key is new (`lrucache/cache.py:34`).

`SOLUTION.md` is written with the same explanation, and nothing under `tests/` was touched.
